items.title: MoE -- Mixture of experts
items.content_html:
Mixture of Experts

Traditional MoE Structure is built with ResNet and embedding mixture FFN and multi-head attention.

Final Output of FFN experts is determined by Top-k restrain, according to each output vector and the unique centroid of each FFN expert's dot product

For the original ResNet,

hl+1=ResFFN∘ResMHA(hl)h^{l+1} = \text{ResFFN}\circ\text{ResMHA}(h^l) hl+1=ResFFN∘ResMHA(hl)

For MoE,

hl+1=MResFFN∘ResMHA(hl)h^{l+1} = \text{MResFFN}\circ\text{ResMHA}(h^l) hl+1=MResFFN∘ResMHA(hl)

The structure of MResFFN is

In industrial applications, Soft-k-max is commonly used to smooth approximate the Top-k operation.

Special Scaling Property of Softmax with Temperature

∥Softmax(kx)∥≥∥Softmax(x)∥k\|\mathrm{Softmax}(kx)\|\geq\|\mathrm{Softmax}(x)\|^{k} ∥Softmax(kx)∥≥∥Softmax(x)∥k

kkk is the temperature of Softmax

Consider

∥Softmax(kx)∥2=∥(ekxi∑jekxj)i∥2=∑i(ekxi∑jekxj)2=1(∑jekxj)2∑i(ekxi)2∥Softmax(x)∥2k=[∑i(exi∑jexj)2]k=1(∑jexj)2k(∑ie2xi)k\begin{aligned} \|\mathrm{Softmax}(kx)\|^2 &= \left\|\left(\frac{e^{kx_i}}{\sum_j e^{kx_j}}\right)_i\right\|^2\\ & = \sum_{i}\left(\frac{e^{kx_i}}{\sum_j e^{kx_j}}\right)^2\\ & = \frac{1}{(\sum_j e^{kx_j})^2}\sum_{i} \left(e^{kx_i}\right)^2\\ \|\mathrm{Softmax}(x)\|^{2k}&= \left[\sum_{i}\left(\frac{e^{x_i}}{\sum_j e^{x_j}}\right)^2\right]^k\\ & = \frac{1}{(\sum_j e^{x_j})^{2k}} \left(\sum_i e^{2x_i}\right)^k \end{aligned} ∥Softmax(kx)∥2∥Softmax(x)∥2k​=​(∑j​ekxj​ekxi​​)i​​2=i∑​(∑j​ekxj​ekxi​​)2=(∑j​ekxj​)21​i∑​(ekxi​)2=​i∑​(∑j​exj​exi​​)2​k=(∑j​exj​)2k1​(i∑​e2xi​)k​

Let ui:=exiu_i := e^{x_i}ui​:=exi​,S=∑uiS = \sum u_iS=∑ui​, pi=uiSp_i = \dfrac{u_i}{S}pi​=Sui​​ then

∑pi=∑piS=1\sum p_i = \sum \frac{p_i}{S} = 1 ∑pi​=∑Spi​​=1

∑ui2k(∑uik)2≥(∑ui2)k(∑ui)2k\frac{\sum u_i^{2k}}{(\sum u_i^k)^2} \geq \frac{(\sum u_i^2)^k}{(\sum u_i)^{2k}} (∑uik​)2∑ui2k​​≥(∑ui​)2k(∑ui2​)k​

Then

∑ui2k(∑ui)2k≥(∑uik)2(∑ui2)k\sum u_i^{2k}\left(\sum u_i\right)^{2k}\geq \left(\sum u_i^{k}\right)^{2}\left(\sum u_i ^2\right)^k ∑ui2k​(∑ui​)2k≥(∑uik​)2(∑ui2​)k

Equally

S4k∑pi2k≥S4k(∑pik)2(∑pi2)k S^{4k}\sum p_i^{2k} \geq S^{4k} \left(\sum p_i^{k}\right)^2 \left(\sum p_i^2\right)^k S4k∑pi2k​≥S4k(∑pik​)2(∑pi2​)k

∑pi2k≥(∑pik)2(∑pi2)k\sum p_i^{2k} \geq \left(\sum p_i^{k}\right)^2 \left(\sum p_i^2\right)^k ∑pi2k​≥(∑pik​)2(∑pi2​)k

Let Ar=∑pir<(∑pi)r=1A_r = \sum p_i^r < (\sum p_i)^r = 1Ar​=∑pir​<(∑pi​)r=1

Then

A2k≥Ak2A2kA_{2k} \geq A_k^2 A_2^k A2k​≥Ak2​A2k​

According to Hölder's Inequality

Ar≤A1θA2k1−θ=A2k1−θA_r \leq A_1^{\theta} A_{2k}^{1-\theta} = A_{2k}^{1-\theta} Ar​≤A1θ​A2k1−θ​=A2k1−θ​

While r=θ+2k(1−θ)=kr = \theta + 2k(1-\theta) = kr=θ+2k(1−θ)=k

1−θ=k−12k−11-\theta = \frac{k-1}{2k-1} 1−θ=2k−1k−1​

Ak≤A2kk−12k−1A_k \leq A_{2k}^{\frac{k-1}{2k-1}} Ak​≤A2k2k−1k−1​​

While r=θ+2k(1−θ)=2r = \theta + 2k(1-\theta) = 2r=θ+2k(1−θ)=2

1−θ=12k−11-\theta = \frac{1}{2k-1} 1−θ=2k−11​

A2≤A2k12k−1A_2 \leq A_{2k}^{\frac{1}{2k-1}} A2​≤A2k2k−11​​

Then

Ak2A2k≤A2k2(k−1)+k2k−1=A2k3k−22k−1<A2kA_k^2A_2^k \leq A_{2k}^{\frac{2(k-1)+k}{2k-1}} = A_{2k}^{\frac{3k-2}{2k-1}}<A_{2k} Ak2​A2k​≤A2k2k−12(k−1)+k​​=A2k2k−13k−2​​<A2k​

In addition, for norm of k-scaling-Softmax, we have its partial derivation

∂∂k∥Softmax(kx)∥2=∂∂k∑i(ekxi∑jekxj)2=∑i∂∂k(ekxi∑jekxj)2=∑i2xiekxi(∑ekxj)2−2ekxi∑jekxj∑xjekxj(∑jekxj)4=∑i2ekxi(∑jekxj)3(xi∑ekxj−∑xjekxj)<2∑ixi∑ekxj−2∑xjekxj=2∑1<i,j<n(xi−xj)(ekxi−ekxj)\begin{aligned} \frac{\partial}{\partial k}\|\mathrm{Softmax}(kx)\|^2 &= \frac{\partial}{\partial k} \sum_{i}\left(\frac{e^{kx_i}}{\sum_j e^{kx_j}}\right)^2\\ & = \sum_i \frac{\partial}{\partial k}\left(\frac{e^{kx_i}}{\sum_j e^{kx_j}}\right)^2\\ & = \sum_i \frac{2x_i e^{kx_i}(\sum e^{kx_j})^2 - 2e^{kx_i}\sum_j e^{kx_j} \sum x_je^{kx_j} }{(\sum_j e^{kx_j})^4}\\ & = \sum_i \frac{2e^{kx_i}}{(\sum_j e^{kx_j})^3} \left(x_i \sum e^{kx_j} - \sum x_je^{kx_j}\right)\\ &< 2\sum_i x_i \sum e^{kx_j} - 2\sum x_j e^{kx_j}\\ & = 2\sum_{1<i,j<n}(x_i-x_j)(e^{kx_i}-e^{kx_j}) \end{aligned} ∂k∂​∥Softmax(kx)∥2​=∂k∂​i∑​(∑j​ekxj​ekxi​​)2=i∑​∂k∂​(∑j​ekxj​ekxi​​)2=i∑​(∑j​ekxj​)42xi​ekxi​(∑ekxj​)2−2ekxi​∑j​ekxj​∑xj​ekxj​​=i∑​(∑j​ekxj​)32ekxi​​(xi​∑ekxj​−∑xj​ekxj​)<2i∑​xi​∑ekxj​−2∑xj​ekxj​=21<i,j<n∑​(xi​−xj​)(ekxi​−ekxj​)​
